requested_items.objective: Find the smallest compute throughput that remains memory/interconnect-bound for Llama7B 131k native-GQA KV8 under the practical high-SRAM HBM/NoC region, using the merged all-measured local L1 baseline and physical HBM memory/NoC frontier as inputs.

expected_result.reason: This pass should show whether increasing compute beyond the current measured local baseline matters once SRAM capacity, HBM service, and local/global NoC bounds dominate the Llama7B 131k attention schedule.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #750 and merge 22fa61daf7c12bfb9fca06a528ef9a98b0fa9137 at 2026-06-03T06:56:30Z.
